prose:
Frontier‐orbital calculation completed with chemkit’s frontier-orbitals skill at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier “standard”, density-fit) DFT level on the fixed O₂ geometry provided, in the gas phase, charge 0 and multiplicity 3 (UKS). The SCF converged in 7 cycles; the engine reported no warnings and the integrity check is trustworthy.

Headline result (gas phase):
HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.2880586 eV  
(HOMO = –8.8739616 eV, LUMO = –3.5859031 eV)

Koopmans descriptors: IP = 8.8739616 eV, EA = 3.5859031 eV, χ = 6.2299323 eV, η = 2.6440293 eV, S = 0.37821064 eV⁻¹, ω = 7.3395664 eV.

Live SCF log was written during the run to the out file in /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpsi3i2799/. The full result JSON is at the same location (live.json).
